5bbb646788ac4f13.source_text: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
5bbb646788ac4f13.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman pwodiksyon tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXIT labèl tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literal mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

81cf480cb2c4d98d.source_text: And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
81cf480cb2c4d98d.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman pwodiksyon tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXIT labèl tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literal mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

3055121551dc4def.source_text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
3055121551dc4def.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman soti nan tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXPITE etikèt tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literalman mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

c45422fd74b09bef.source_text: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
c45422fd74b09bef.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman pwodiksyon tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXIT labèl tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literal mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

5c690f124d36717b.source_text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
5c690f124d36717b.translation: ###  SYSTEM (DO NOT TRANSLATE, DO NOT INCLUDE IN OUTUTUT) Tradui vèsè Bib la nan seksyon SOURCE TEXT la nan kreyòl ayisyen (). Règ: 1. Sèlman pwodiksyon tradiksyon anpa gen anyen lòt 2. DO NOT repete enstriksyon, glossary, oswa kontèks 3. DO NOT EXIT labèl tankou "" oswa "[" oswa "") 4. Preserve egzak siyifikasyon teolojik 5. Sèvi ak natirèl, fluid kreyòl ayisyen (pa literal mo-pou-mo) 6. Sèvi sèlman ak kreyòl ayisyen id franse 7.

e3bad83cd861df76.source_text: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
e3bad83cd861df76.translation: Pado mulonyo Bondye Allah manjadikan langik jo bumi.

d023bf9aeaed62fd.source_text: And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
d023bf9aeaed62fd.translation: Bumi manjadi Lespri Bondye padang gurun, sarato indak ado lai sasuatu di dirinyo. Di ateh lauik lauik, tampaklah kalam; Roh Allah bajalan di ateh ayie.

1b75171059be95c3.source_text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
1b75171059be95c3.translation: Sasudah tu Bondye Allah bakato, "Biyalah ado nan tarang!" Sudah tu, ado pulo nan bakcando itu.

d35f30b8b0787e48.source_text: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
d35f30b8b0787e48.translation: Allah manampak, Bondye baraso nan tarang tu baiak. Allah mampasisiahkan tarang dari nan kalam.

892f91fbf871de41.source_text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
892f91fbf871de41.translation: Allah ma Bondye imbau nan tarang tu, "Urang", nan kalam tu pulo, "Malam". Mako malam jo pagi pun manjadi ari nan partamu.

423c243ee7ababcc.source_text: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.
423c243ee7ababcc.translation: Sasudah tu, Bondye Allah bakato pulo, "Biyalah ado langik di tangah-tangah ayie, nan mamisahkan ayie dari ayie".

5ffa89de8248eb8e.source_text: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.
5ffa89de8248eb8e.translation: Sasudah tu, Bondye Allah mambuwek langik, inyo mampasisiahkan ayie di bawah langik tu, dari ayie nan di ateh langik.

041fff07d652f7b4.source_text: And God called the firmament Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.
041fff07d652f7b4.translation: Mako, Allah Bondye ma imbau langik tu, "Langik". Sudah tu malam jo pagi, iyolah ari nan kaduwo.

139b084e85f4ab99.source_text: And God said, Let the waters under the heavens be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
139b084e85f4ab99.translation: Sudah tu, Bondye Allah bakato pulo, "Biyai ayie-ayie nan di bawah langik tingga di sabuwah tampaik, sudah tu barulah nampak tanah nan kariang". Kasadonyo tu tajadi pulo.

e996bb9aad362506.source_text: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.
e996bb9aad362506.translation: Mako, Allah Bondye ma imbau tanah nan kariang tu, "Tanah", sarato jo ayie-ayie nan biasonyo ko, "Lawah Lauik". Allah manampak sagalo sasuatu tu elok.

a2b2ecea964791e9.source_text: And God said, Let the earth put forth grass, herbs yielding seed, [and] fruit-trees bearing fruit after their kind, wherein is the seed thereof, upon the earth: and it was so.
a2b2ecea964791e9.translation: Sasudah tu Bondye Allah bakato pulo, "Biyalah sagalo ramuan nan ado di bumi, iyolah rumpuik-rumpuik nan mananam bibitnyo, sarato jo batang-batang buwah nan mambuah buah-buahan manuruik jinihnyo". Kasadonyo tu tajadi pulo.

f5f62229f7719d6c.source_text: And the earth brought forth grass, herbs yielding seed after their kind, and trees bearing fruit, wherein is the seed thereof, after their kind: and God saw that it was good.
f5f62229f7719d6c.translation: Bumi ma Bondye ambiak-i rumpuik nan mananam, sarato jo batang-batang nan mambuah buah-buahan. Allah manampak sagalo sasuatu tu elok-elok.

67ca8e054e3f7e54.source_text: And there was evening and there was morning, a third day.
67ca8e054e3f7e54.translation: Malam jo subuh lah tajadi, ari nan katigo.

cf5428b857cbef00.source_text: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days and years:
cf5428b857cbef00.translation: Sasudah tu, Bondye Allah bakato pulo, "Biyalah ado cahayo-cahayo di langik, nan ka mamisahkan siang jo malam. Inyolah nan ka manjadi tando-tando, untuak manyatokan musiman, ari-ari, sarato jo tawun-taun.

58e2d4deb1049c5f.source_text: and let them be for lights in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
58e2d4deb1049c5f.translation: Biyapun baitu, ka manjadi tarang-tarang di langik, untuak mambari tarang di bumi".

ded777df38334e08.source_text: And God made the two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: [he made] the stars also.
ded777df38334e08.translation: Kudian Allah Bondye mambuwek nan duwo cahayo nan gadang tu, nan labiah gadang untuak manguwasoi ari siang, nan ketek pulo untuak manjago malam. Inyo manjadikan pulo bintang-bintang.

ca3bed6b70d2588d.source_text: And God set them in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth,
ca3bed6b70d2588d.translation: Allah manjadikan Bondye bintang-bintang tu, manjadi tarang di bumi.

2a8367d8dd080d5e.source_text: and to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.
2a8367d8dd080d5e.translation: untuak manguwasoi Bondye siang jo malam, sarato untuak mamisahkan tarang dari nan kalam. Allah manampak, baraso itu elok.

bea3e7712816dcbd.source_text: And there was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.
bea3e7712816dcbd.translation: Malam jo subuah pun tajadi, iyolah ari nan ka ampek.

fbe8d132169cb490.source_text: And God said, Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.
fbe8d132169cb490.translation: Sasudah tu, Bondye Allah bakato pulo, "Jikok di dalam ayie, banyaklah binatang-binatang nan iduik. Biaso pulolah buruang-buruang tabang di ateh langik".

e5b2b845654d4aff.source_text: And seeing the multitudes, he went up into the mountain: and when he had sat down, his disciples came unto him:
e5b2b845654d4aff.translation: Kutiko Isa Almasih maliyek urang nan banyak tu, Baliau nayiak ka bukik. Sasudah Baliau duduak, pangikuik-pangikuik-Nyo bi tibo kabake Baliau.

fafddf80773ec277.source_text: and he opened his mouth and taught them, saying,
fafddf80773ec277.translation: Isa Almasih muloi mambarikan pangajaran kabake urang-urang tu, bakcando iko,

00127225cb8d7e0f.source_text: Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
00127225cb8d7e0f.translation: Babahagialah urang-urang Lespri nan bansaik ati; dek karano, inyo tu lah nan punyo Karajaan Sarugo.

70f6d8041b65ad8c.source_text: Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.
70f6d8041b65ad8c.translation: Babahagialah urang nan manangih, dek karano inyo ka dihiburkan!

800cb57fda21923e.source_text: Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.
800cb57fda21923e.translation: Babahagialah urang-urang nan lamah lambuik, dek karano inyo ka mandapekkan bumi.

08c7eb8c1878f1f0.source_text: Blessed are they that hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.
08c7eb8c1878f1f0.translation: Babahagialah urang-urang nan maraso lapar, sarato jo haid manuruik kabanaran; dek karano, inyo ka bi makan sampai kanyang!

0f138e1f3b26d9a8.source_text: Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.
0f138e1f3b26d9a8.translation: Babahagialah urang-urang nan suko mangasiahi, dek karano, Allah ka ma ibo kabake inyo!

4fe35a5443d0ed4f.source_text: Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.
4fe35a5443d0ed4f.translation: Babahagialah urang Bondye nan barasiah ati, dek karano inyo ka maliyek Allah!

46def76b6ed191cf.source_text: Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called sons of God.
46def76b6ed191cf.translation: Babahagialah urang-urang Bondye nan babuwek damai; dek karano, inyo tu ka dinamokan anak-anak Allah.

abafa60130674b15.source_text: Blessed are they that have been persecuted for righteousness’ sake: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
abafa60130674b15.translation: Babahagialah urang nan di aniayo dek karano babuwek baiak. Dek karano, inyo tu lah nan punyo Karajaan Sarugo.

2623881f29a0d6b8.source_text: Blessed are ye when [men] shall reproach you, and persecute you, and say all manner of evil against you falsely, for my sake.
2623881f29a0d6b8.translation: Babahagialah angku-angku, jikok dek karano di Ambo, urang-urang tu ma ang-kau, sarato ma aniayo angkau, sarato jo bakato-kato nan jahek taradok angkau.

9aa0102e749693a7.source_text: Rejoice, and be exceeding glad: for great is your reward in heaven: for so persecuted they the prophets that were before you.
9aa0102e749693a7.translation: Andaklah angku-angku bagadang ati, sarato basukocito! Dek karano, gadanglah upahnyo di sarugo. Baitu pulo jo caro nan baitu, urang-urang tu ma aniayo nabi-nabi nan di jaman sabalunnyo.

73e20443984e0d50.source_text: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
73e20443984e0d50.translation: Pado mulonyo, Bondye nan Sabda tu ado juwo. Sabda itu samo-samo jo Allah, nan Salah tu adolah Allah.

c39b319a7a6510ef.source_text: The same was in the beginning with God.
c39b319a7a6510ef.translation: Pado mulonyo Bondye Baliau samo-samo jo Allah.

20e533cdbb174cc7.source_text: All things were made through him; and without him was not anything made that hath been made.
20e533cdbb174cc7.translation: Kasadonyo lah dijadikan malalui Baliau, indak ciyek juwo doh sasuatu nan dijadikan, jikok Allah indak basatu jo Baliau.

2a323e74e81be861.source_text: In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
2a323e74e81be861.translation: Dalam Baliaulah ado iduik, nan iduik tu adolah tarang untuak manusia.

f8d6c0510fe2b776.source_text: And the light shineth in the darkness; and the darkness apprehended it not.
f8d6c0510fe2b776.translation: Tarang tu tarang di nan kalam, tapi, nan kalam tu indak dapek doh mancegakkannyo.

291e631b1ede595c.source_text: There came a man, sent from God, whose name was John.
291e631b1ede595c.translation: Tibolah surang Bondye urang nan di utuih dek Allah, nan banamo si Yahya.

bccd1e2e4787c707.source_text: The same came for witness, that he might bear witness of the light, that all might believe through him.
bccd1e2e4787c707.translation: Inyo datang sabagai sasi, untuak mancuritokan tarang tu, supayo kasadonyo urang bi picayo malalui inyo.

c7cbd6f99d4dd8d4.source_text: He was not the light, but [came] that he might bear witness of the light.
c7cbd6f99d4dd8d4.translation: Inyo tu indak tarang doh, tapi datang untuak mambaritokan tarang tu.

8cb3b3f15969a087.source_text: There was the true light, [even the light] which lighteth every man, coming into the world.
8cb3b3f15969a087.translation: Pado suatu ari, tarang nan sabana-bana tarang tu datang ka dunia. Inyo tu lah nan mambari tarang kabake satiyok urang.

c1c37dc59500e01f.source_text: He was in the world, and the world was made through him, and the world knew him not.
c1c37dc59500e01f.translation: Baliau lah ado di dunia ko, dunia dijadikan malalui Baliau, tapi dunia indak tawu jo Baliau.

752ef0a2db423bb7.source_text: He came unto his own, and they that were his own received him not.
752ef0a2db423bb7.translation: Baliau datang kabake umaik-Nyo sandiri, tapi urang-urang tu indak manarimo Baliau.

e3d554cae133948a.source_text: But as many as received him, to them gave he the right to become children of God, [even] to them that believe on his name:
e3d554cae133948a.translation: Tapi kasadonyo Bondye urang nan manarimo Baliau, Baliau mambarikan kuwaso untuak manjadi anak-anak Allah, kabake urang-urang nan picayo kabake Baliau.

0bc94919fb24c5ce.source_text: who were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God.
0bc94919fb24c5ce.translation: Anak-anak tu Bondye lah dilayiekan, indak dari darah doh, indak pulo doh dari kahandak manusia, sarato indak pulo dari paratuaran manusia doh, tapi dari Allah.

4c69883ce3867601.source_text: And the Word became flesh, and dwelt among us ( and we beheld his glory, glory as of the only begotten from the Father), full of grace and truth.
4c69883ce3867601.translation: Firman tu Papa manjadi manusia, mako inyo tingga di tangah-tangah kito. Kami manampak kamuliaan-Nyo, iyolah kamuliyaan Anak Tungga dari Bapak. Inyo sabana mampunyoi raso ibo kapado Allah, sarato jo batua.

b2a56aebd99b5382.source_text: ( and the life was manifested, and we have seen, and bear witness, and declare unto you the life, the eternal [life], which was with the Father, and was manifested unto us);
b2a56aebd99b5382.translation: Nah, iduik Papa tu lah dinyatokan. Kami lah maliyek, kami mambarikan pangakuan, sarato mambaritokan kabake angku-angku tantang iduik tu, iyolah iduik sajati nan kaka, nan lah ado samo-samo jo Bapak, sarato lah didatokan kabake kami.

9caf01e95ba2519e.source_text: that which we have seen and heard declare we unto you also, that ye also may have fellowship with us: yea, and our fellowship is with the Father, and with his Son Jesus Christ:
9caf01e95ba2519e.translation: Nan lah Pitit Papa Kris Jezi kami liyek jo nan lah kami danga, itu pulolah nan kami baritokan kabake angkau, supayo angkau bi sato samo-samo jo kami. Kasadonyo nan kami tarimo tu, adolah basatu jo Bapak sarato jo Anak-Nyo Isa Almasih.

dafdb7d73681945c.source_text: and these things we write, that our joy may be made full.
dafdb7d73681945c.translation: Kami manulihkan kasadonyo tu, supayo angku-angku buliah sabana-bana bagadang ati.

295594b3bab35b6b.source_text: And this is the message which we have heard from him and announce unto you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
295594b3bab35b6b.translation: Ikolah pasan Bondye nan kami danga dari Isa Almasih, nan kami baritokan kabake angku-angku: Allah adolah tarang, di dalam Baliau indak ado ciyek juwo doh nan kalam.

b875913432e5e5d7.source_text: If we say that we have fellowship with him and walk in the darkness, we lie, and do not the truth:
b875913432e5e5d7.translation: Jikok kito bakato, baraso kito basatu jo Allah, tapi nan kiniko kito iduik di nan kalam, mako kito baduto, sarato indak mangarajokan nan bana.

9720f94471b79fba.source_text: but if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus his Son cleanseth us from all sin.
9720f94471b79fba.translation: Tapi, jikok Pitit Jezi kito iduik di nan tarang, samo jo bakcando Isa Almasih, nan iduik di dalam tarang tu, mako kito samo-samo mamatuahi, sarato darah Isa Almasih Anak-Nyo, mambasiahkan kito dari sagalo doso.

129cf4bd3646ff25.source_text: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
129cf4bd3646ff25.translation: Jikok kito bakato, baraso kito indak badoso doh, mako kito mangicuahkan diri kito sandiri, sarato indak ado doh kabanaran di dalam diri kito.

0d948f69a54ddc06.source_text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
0d948f69a54ddc06.translation: Tapi, jikok kito ma-akui doso-doso kito, Allah dapek dipicayoi sarato jo batua. Baliau ka ma-ampunan doso urang, sarato ka mambarasiahkan kito dari sagalo karajo-karajo nan jahek.

7bd8729e3d485b50.source_text: If we say that we have not sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.
7bd8729e3d485b50.translation: Jikok kito bakato, baraso kito indak panah babuwek doso, mako kito manjadikan Allah panduto, sarato kato-kato Allah indak ado di dalam diri kito.

eec821418d71388c.source_text: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
eec821418d71388c.translation: Tatuhuhu daduluhuhuhu Bondye manahuhu huadahuhu cadhuhu anuhu daduruhu dadulahu daduahu dadhu daduduhu dadunuhu dadundahu dadudhu dadudahu dadandahu dadadahu dadamuhu dadamahu dadadihu dadamadhu dadadhu dadaduhu dadampam dadapam dadam dadampamo dadamparam dadampamahu damatam dadám dadampampamaham dadampamani dadampamaram dadampi dadampamayam dadapo dadampamu dadampammama dadampami dadampamasamasamasani dadampamaa dadampamai dadampamana dadampamama ramadampama dom dom domapanama domapanopamaamaama ramamanama ramama domapi domapanapanama ramamasani domapanapa domapanampamaama domapamaama kamampama kama kama kama karampama manamaama katamaama na katama katamo katama karampamo katampama katampi katama kama katampiampi katampi kamampi katapa katampi kapapa kama kama kadampama kamapi katampi kasampi katami katampi kau katampi kadampi katampami katamp

c64f0be7da42f4cd.source_text: And God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them.
c64f0be7da42f4cd.translation: Tacuguro ŋat Bondye ma tye calo caline; i caline pa Lubaŋa en ocwalo en; gin oketogi mac ki dako.

bffba364dbae3964.source_text: and I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed: he shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.
bffba364dbae3964.translation: तَوْ أَجْعَلُ عَدَاوَةً بَينَكَ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْمَرْأَةِ، وَتَحْتَ نَسْلِكَ وسَلِيمِهَا، فَيَضْحَكُ رَأْسُكَ فَتُحْطِمُ رِجْلَهُ.

50e6aea3807cb42e.source_text: and I will bless them that bless thee, and him that curseth thee will I curse: and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.
50e6aea3807cb42e.translation: and I will bless those who bless thee, and him who curseth thee will I curse; and in thee shall be blessed all the families of the earth.

4fdaf74a5c64191f.source_text: and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed; because thou hast obeyed my voice.
4fdaf74a5c64191f.translation: and in thy seed shall be blessed all the nations of the earth; because thou hast obeyed my voice.

1c4c33d163f135d5.source_text: Thou shalt have no other gods before me.
1c4c33d163f135d5.translation: Tacalo pi kin ŋat ma tye kacel kwedwa i nyim Lubaŋa.

1d3d777d106ef90f.source_text: Honor thy father and thy mother, that thy days may be long in the land which Jehovah thy God giveth thee.
1d3d777d106ef90f.translation: Tenda a Papa Bondye tu padre y a tu madre, para que tengas largos días en la tierra que te da el Señor tu Dios.

9a252bc3f757e12b.source_text: Hear, O Israel: Jehovah our God is one Jehovah:
9a252bc3f757e12b.translation: Escucha, oh Bondye Israel: El Señor nuestro Dios es un solo Señor.

4d10f89917a9dac0.source_text: and thou shalt love Jehovah thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.
4d10f89917a9dac0.translation: and thou Bondye shalt love Jehovah thy God with all thy heart, and with all thine soul, and in all thy strength.

51d8a61a3e6704aa.source_text: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the wicked, Nor standeth in the way of sinners, Nor sitteth in the seat of scoffers:
51d8a61a3e6704aa.translation: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the wicked, nor standeth in the way of sinners, nor sitteth in a chair of mockers.

fc7d2b9bf47de8fb.source_text: Jehovah is my shepherd; I shall not want.
fc7d2b9bf47de8fb.translation: Christ est mon pasteur; je ne manquerai point.

7225a1cbd9add980.source_text: God is our refuge and strength, A very present help in trouble.
7225a1cbd9add980.translation: Christ est Bondye notre refuge et notre force, un aide précieux dans la détresse.

e4aee040c3af1b55.source_text: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.
e4aee040c3af1b55.translation: Tagama, y Bondye sabáis que yo soy Dios; me exaltaré entre las naciones, me exaltaré en la tierra.

ae326e685d99c96f.source_text: Create in me a clean heart, O God; And renew a right spirit within me.
ae326e685d99c96f.translation: un core Lespri Bondye puro crea en mí, oh Dios, y renueva un espíritu recto en mí.

68cfe210cdedbeda.source_text: Bless Jehovah, O my soul; And all that is within me, [bless] his holy name.
68cfe210cdedbeda.translation: Tagatham Rwot, inoyona; ki gin ma tye i cwinya, guworre nyiŋe maleŋ.

7ee25b4cd1ac0344.source_text: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, And light unto my path.
7ee25b4cd1ac0344.translation: Littelo tu es una lámpara para mis pies, y luz para mi camino.

c537c3f76394e782.source_text: I will give thanks unto thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made: Wonderful are thy works; And that my soul knoweth right well.
c537c3f76394e782.translation: Denn ich bin schrecklich und wunderbar gemacht. Und wunderbare sind deine Werke; und daß meine Seele richtig weiß.

21ce2da7e00be40d.source_text: Great is Jehovah, and greatly to be praised; And his greatness is unsearchable.
21ce2da7e00be40d.translation: Christ est grand, et grandement louable; et sa grandeur est impensable.

4e3abb0b8a73eedc.source_text: The fear of Jehovah is the beginning of knowledge; [But] the foolish despise wisdom and instruction.
4e3abb0b8a73eedc.translation: Denn die Furcht des HERREN ist der Anfang der Erkenntnis; aber die Narrligen verwergen Weissheit und Unterweisung.

e3c78b8f2e499a8d.source_text: Trust in Jehovah with all thy heart, And lean not upon thine own understanding:
e3c78b8f2e499a8d.translation: Touche à l'Eternel de tout ton cœur, et ne t'appuie point sur ton intelligence.

34165ad5b0f8236b.source_text: In all thy ways acknowledge him, And he will direct thy paths.
34165ad5b0f8236b.translation: Dans toutes tes voies, reconnais-le, et il redressera tes sentiers.

c9dc7af5b8bf669f.source_text: Train up a child in the way he should go, And even when he is old he will not depart from it.
c9dc7af5b8bf669f.translation: estresar un niño en el camino que debe recorrer; y aun cuando sea viejo, no se apartará de él.

a4b50ca638a5f15f.source_text: but they that wait for Jehovah shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles; they shall run, and not be weary; they shall walk, and not faint.
a4b50ca638a5f15f.translation: Tampulu babalagami a Yahova agarubagami; agurubagami ayabagami. Ayugami ayugami agugubagami, agudubagami agugamiagami agudamiagudami agulabagamiagupamiagulubagamo agudamuagudamaagudamoagudamagudayoagudamugayagudamayaagugamaagugumiagugamiogamoagugamuagugamoagupamaagurubagamoagulumaguroaguruyagudamugayaaguruagururagamoagurugayagurugaaguru gagaagurugaguroaguragoaguruogaaguruogurooguroaguroogaaguroogorooguroogauguroogiroogurooguagurooguoguroogooguroogatoguroooguroogaruroogaoguroogliogurooganuroogaګuroogaogaogoroogaogaogaoroogoroogoogaogaororoogaongoongoongoogaoroogaorororoogonoogaogaorioguroongoongoogorooroogaoroogoogoogoogoroogonaogonaogonaoguroogonaogororororaoguroonaogurooroogaoneog

963af3ae74e2aa9b.source_text: But he was wounded for our transgressions, he was bruised for our iniquities; the chastisement of our peace was upon him; and with his stripes we are healed.
963af3ae74e2aa9b.translation: Tacuguro pi latimarere cauzuguro cauzaguro caucaguro. Y la pena de nuestra paz estaba sobre él; y con sus plagas somos curados.

9583e127ebfe7604.source_text: All we like sheep have gone astray; we have turned every one to his own way; and Jehovah hath laid on him the iniquity of us all.
9583e127ebfe7604.translation: Together we have gone astray like sheep; we have turned each to his own way; and Jehovah hath laid upon him the iniquity of us all.

68918e383b2a9877.source_text: For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways, saith Jehovah.
68918e383b2a9877.translation: Porque mis pensamientos no son vuestros pensamientos, ni vuestros caminos son mis caminos, dice Jehová.

11c8f17fd0ad552a.source_text: The Spirit of the Lord Jehovah is upon me; because Jehovah hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek; he hath sent me to bind up the broken-hearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening [of the prison] to them that are bound;
11c8f17fd0ad552a.translation: Tacagugug Rwot Seyè Lespri Lubaŋa tye i koma; pien Rwot ociro an me me tito lok me kwena maber bot jo ma mwol; ocwalo an me tweyo jo ma cwinygi tururo, wek anywale gony ki i opii, dok bene atero ni ka gonyogi woko i mabuc.

0c89218d0aaa9425.source_text: But this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, saith Jehovah: I will put my law in their inward parts, and in their heart will I write it; and I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
0c89218d0aaa9425.translation: Mais voici Bondye l'alliance que je ferai avec la maison d'Israël après ces jours-là, dit l'Eternel: Je mettrai ma loi dans leur cœur, et je l'écrirai dans leur coeur; et je serai leur Dieu, et ils seront mon peuple.

f911001f9a7f6142.source_text: He hath showed thee, O man, what is good; and what doth Jehovah require of thee, but to do justly, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with thy God?
f911001f9a7f6142.translation: O homme, Bondye él te ha mostrado lo que es bueno; y lo que pide de ti el Señor, sino hacer justicia, amar bondad, y andar humildamente con tu Dios.

98a334da99507b6d.source_text: And she shall bring forth a son; and thou shalt call his name JESUS; for it is he that shall save his people from their sins.
98a334da99507b6d.translation: And she Pitit Jezi shall bear a son; and thou shalt call his name Jesus; for he shall save his people from their sins.

ea03aabef148bfdb.source_text: Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
ea03aabef148bfdb.translation: Blessed are Lespri the poor in spirit; for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

dd00cdbf68ebd288.source_text: Blessed are they that hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.
dd00cdbf68ebd288.translation: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness; for they shall be filled.

06fd18f7074026b4.source_text: After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father who art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name.
06fd18f7074026b4.translation: Tacalo acagü Papa bene niŋo doŋ wulego lok man ni, Wonwa ma tye i polo, giyel nyiŋi.

e1c57c362599d328.source_text: Give us this day our daily bread.

830468b98e91d58d.source_text: And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors.
830468b98e91d58d.translation: And forgive us our debts, as we have also forgiven our debtors.

455a708f44d4b23a.source_text: But seek ye first his kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
455a708f44d4b23a.translation: Tacaloŋo wuyenyo kerone pa Lubaŋa, ki kit ma en tye atir; ci gin magi ducu gibimedo botwu.

33c3925c77fd88df.source_text: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you:
33c3925c77fd88df.translation: Tampuluyani, ndipo adzakupatsani; funafunani, ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani ndipo adzakutsegulirani.

839d160dbe285e92.source_text: Come unto me, all ye that labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
839d160dbe285e92.translation: to dou moi, vous tous qui êtes fatigués et chargés, et je vous réconforterai.

a7754badea573057.source_text: And a second like [unto it] is this, Thou shalt love thy neighbor as thyself.
a7754badea573057.translation: And a second like unto it is this, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.

c95c471f52e4557a.source_text: Go ye therefore, and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them into the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit:
c95c471f52e4557a.translation: Then go Pitit Papa Sent-Lespri and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit.

5b1746ceb5a63bda.source_text: teaching them to observe all things whatsoever I commanded you: and lo, I am with you always, even unto the end of the world.
5b1746ceb5a63bda.translation: lélé leur faire toutes les choses que je vous ai commandées; et voici, je suis avec vous toujours, jusqu'à l'achèvement du monde.

414dbc34919a261a.source_text: For the Son of man also came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.
414dbc34919a261a.translation: Denn der Pitit Manners Sohn nicht kam, daß er bedient werde, sondern daß er diende, und daß sein Leben ein Lösegeld für viele.

1b25b21492b9d380.source_text: for there is born to you this day in the city of David a Saviour, who is Christ the Lord.
1b25b21492b9d380.translation: Porque hoy Seyè Kris ha nacido para vosotros un salvador, que es Cristo Señor.

862f1b7cec19156f.source_text: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, Because he anointed me to preach good tidings to the poor: He hath sent me to proclaim release to the captives, And recovering of sight to the blind, To set at liberty them that are bruised,
862f1b7cec19156f.translation: Tacagugugug Rwot Seyè Lespri tye i koma; pien ociro an me me tito lok me kwena maber bot lucan; ocwalo an me tito kwena me gonyo i kin jo ma guto i opii, dok bene miyo waŋe neno bot lugo, wek agony dano ma kinogi woko.

1a103ec77117aec8.source_text: I say unto you, that even so there shall be joy in heaven over one sinner that repenteth, [more] than over ninety and nine righteous persons, who need no repentance.
1a103ec77117aec8.translation: told you that likewise there will be joy in heaven over one sinner who repents, than over ninety-nine righteous ones who need not repent.

4887f6a8404d5000.source_text: For the Son of man came to seek and to save that which was lost.
4887f6a8404d5000.translation: Porque el Pitit Hijo del hombre vino a buscar y salvar lo que estaba perdido.

28f9dac5482d83b3.source_text: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
28f9dac5482d83b3.translation: In the Bondye beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God; and the word was God.

c8fcb68c09506814.source_text: And the Word became flesh, and dwelt among us ( and we beheld his glory, glory as of the only begotten from the Father), full of grace and truth.
c8fcb68c09506814.translation: And the Papa Word became flesh, and dwelt among us; and we beheld his glory, glory as of the only begotten of the Father.

01ccd778ccd22087.source_text: Sanctify them in the truth: thy word is truth.
01ccd778ccd22087.translation: unda them in veridad; tu palabra es veridad.

e430d343dbd0fd82.source_text: But ye shall receive power, when the Holy Spirit is come upon you: and ye shall be my witnesses both in Jerusalem, and in all Judæa and Samaria, and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
e430d343dbd0fd82.translation: Tacalo ingareŋo Sent-Lespri yam, ka doŋ Cwiny Maleŋ obino i komwu; ci wubin luŋena i Jerucalem, ki i Judaya ducu ki i Camaria, dok bene i agikki lobo.

a61f0e8a21b25663.source_text: And Peter [said] unto them, Repent ye, and be baptized every one of you in the name of Jesus Christ unto the remission of your sins; and ye shall receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.
a61f0e8a21b25663.translation: and Peter Sent-Lespri Kris Jezi said unto them, Repent ye, and be baptized every one of you in the name of Jesus Christ unto the remission of your sins; and ye shall receive the gift of the Holy Ghost.

41dc6221fa600110.source_text: And in none other is there salvation: for neither is there any other name under heaven, that is given among men, wherein we must be saved.
41dc6221fa600110.translation: And in none else is salvation; for there is no other name under heaven, which is given among men, by which we shall be saved.

0f8f361194499fa6.source_text: for all have sinned, and fall short of the glory of God;
0f8f361194499fa6.translation: Porque todos Bondye han pecado, y están privados de la gloria de Dios.

bfd0641d9497ec7b.source_text: But God commendeth his own love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us.
bfd0641d9497ec7b.translation: Mais Dieu Kris Bondye révéle son amour pour nous en ce que Christ est mort pour nous, alors que nous étions pécheurs.

f12af046bcc35472.source_text: There is therefore now no condemnation to them that are in Christ Jesus.
f12af046bcc35472.translation: तब जो Kris Jezi मसीह यीशु में हैं, उन की कोई निन्दा नहीं।

0fb7823bdc2c20c1.source_text: And we know that to them that love God all things work together for good, [even] to them that are called according to [his] purpose.
0fb7823bdc2c20c1.translation: and we Bondye know that to those who love God all things work together for good, even unto those who are called according to his purpose.

a2cc087e4f62aaf3.source_text: because if thou shalt confess with thy mouth Jesus [as] Lord, and shalt believe in thy heart that God raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved:
a2cc087e4f62aaf3.translation: if thou Seyè Jezi Bondye confessest with thy mouth Jesus as Lord, and believe in thy heart that God raised him from the dead, ye shall be saved.

85b743933c12cb68.source_text: I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, to present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable to God, [which is] your spiritual service.
85b743933c12cb68.translation: तब हे Bondye भाइयो, मैं परमेश्वर की करूणा के कारण तुम से बिनती करता हूं कि अपने शरीरों को एक जीवित बली चढ़ाओ, पवित्र और परमेश्वर के ग्रहणयोग्य, जो तुम्हारी आत्मिक सेवा है।

ffeaac38679e116c.source_text: And be not fashioned according to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is the good and acceptable and perfect will of God.
ffeaac38679e116c.translation: And be Bondye not conformed unto this world; but be transformed by the renewal of your mind, that ye may prove what is the will of God, which is good and acceptable and perfect.

534792e479f8fdd7.source_text: Love suffereth long, [and] is kind; love envieth not; love vaunteth not itself, is not puffed up,
534792e479f8fdd7.translation: Lamor sufre mucho, y es amable; el amor no envidiará; el Amor no se vanjará, no se enorgullecerá.

7b7647372833a485.source_text: For I delivered unto you first of all that which also I received: that Christ died for our sins according to the scriptures;
7b7647372833a485.translation: Denn ich Kris übergab euch als erstes das, das ich auch erhiß: daß Christus für unsere Sünden star wie die Schriften.

38c21aa0f5dcebdd.source_text: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, kindness, goodness, faithfulness,
38c21aa0f5dcebdd.translation: Mais le Lespri fruit de l'Esprit est l'amour, la joie, la paix, la patience, la bienveillance, la bonté, la fidélité.

6d3ffe15653bd67c.source_text: for by grace have ye been saved through faith; and that not of yourselves, [it is] the gift of God;
6d3ffe15653bd67c.translation: Denn durch Bondye die Gnade seid ihr gerettet durch die Glaube; und das nicht von euch, sondern die Gabe Gottes.

2836fa04ce4ee6aa.source_text: not of works, that no man should glory.
2836fa04ce4ee6aa.translation: não por obras, para que nadie se glorifique.

854b1e523ea9e73c.source_text: and be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving each other, even as God also in Christ forgave you.
854b1e523ea9e73c.translation: and be Kris Bondye kind to each other, tender heart, forgiving one another, just as God also in Christ forgave you.

20af55a2ef2aec6e.source_text: Finally, be strong in the Lord, and in the strength of his might.
20af55a2ef2aec6e.translation: Tacalo lokke Seyè wubed matek i Rwot, ki i tek pa twerone.

0260b47ada6a2655.source_text: Every scripture inspired of God [is] also profitable for teaching, for reproof, for correction, for instruction which is in righteousness:
0260b47ada6a2655.translation: Toda Escritura Bondye inspirada por Dios, y útil para enseñar, para reprender, para corregir, para instruir en la justicia.

c55217ae38645a64.source_text: But be ye doers of the word, and not hearers only, deluding your own selves.
c55217ae38645a64.translation: Tacagine pi yat gineko, ento pe wuwinyo keken, dok wuŋak woko ki i kinwu.

0922b68b51398b6c.source_text: Even so faith, if it have not works, is dead in itself.
0922b68b51398b6c.translation: Tacalo bene kit ma niye pe tye tic, noŋo en doŋ oto woko ki i kome.

6ceb7d9cddabb79d.source_text: He that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love.
6ceb7d9cddabb79d.translation: Denn der Bondye nicht liebt kennt Gott nicht; denn Gott ist Liebe.

c4f99e7d0669e190.source_text: I am the Alpha and the Omega, saith the Lord God, who is and who was and who is to come, the Almighty.
c4f99e7d0669e190.translation: I am Tout-Pwisan Seyè Bondye the Alpha and the Omega, saith the Lord God, who is and who was and who is to come, the Almighty.

84669b84ed8a41d5.source_text: Behold, I stand at the door and knock: if any man hear my voice and open the door, I will come in to him, and will sup with him, and he with me.
84669b84ed8a41d5.translation: Eis que me levanto a la puerta y toco; si alguno oye mi voz y abre la puerta, entraré a él y cenaré con él, y él conmigo.

a74d206ac311ca9e.source_text: and he shall wipe away every tear from their eyes; and death shall be no more; neither shall there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain, any more: the first things are passed away.
a74d206ac311ca9e.translation: and he will wipe out every tear from their eyes; and death shall be no more; neither shall there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain; and the first things have passed.

77602f0dc151a5e1.source_text: He who testifieth these things saith, Yea: I come quickly. Amen: come, Lord Jesus.
77602f0dc151a5e1.translation: jogo que Seyè Jezi testifica estas cosas dice: Sí, vengo pronto. Amén, ven, Señor Jesús.

584c26dada6c7dbc.source_text: I call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that I have set before thee life and death, the blessing and the curse: therefore choose life, that thou mayest live, thou and thy seed;
584c26dada6c7dbc.translation: Tampampulu ndi dziko ndi mboni pakati panu lero, kuti ndaikha patsogolo panu moyo na kufa, madalitso na kutotedwa; tsono sankhani moyo, kuti mukhale na moyo, iwe ndi mbeu yako.

c63f327e8b40c155.source_text: And bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil [one].
c63f327e8b40c155.translation: And bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one.

e13ff75d5f54c867.source_text: And he said unto them, Go ye into all the world, and preach the gospel to the whole creation.
e13ff75d5f54c867.translation: And said unto them, Go ye into all the world, and preach the gospel unto all creation.

e00ae603e2c36861.source_text: I have been crucified with Christ; and it is no longer I that live, but Christ liveth in me: and that [life] which I now live in the flesh I live in faith, [the faith] which is in the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself up for me.
e00ae603e2c36861.translation: I have Pitit Kris Bondye been crucified with Christ; and I am no longer living, but Christ lives in me; and that which I now live in the flesh I live in faith, which is in the Son of God, who loved me and gave himself for me.

11d8bd473fba8b1b.source_text: meekness, self-control; against such there is no law.
11d8bd473fba8b1b.translation: humildade, autocontrol; contra ellos no hay ley.

7b2b793bd2d1504c.source_text: Now faith is assurance of [things] hoped for, a conviction of things not seen.
7b2b793bd2d1504c.translation: Tenda ye ingatanto pi gin ma gigeno, dok bene ma pe gineno.
